segments.narration: Is Fable 5 melting through your tokens? Mine was.
So I built an open source harness that cuts the burn, without capping Fable's reasoning.
Fable does design and final review only. Implementation and research are delegated to Sonnet and Haiku.
Reports come back short and dense. A usage ledger shows your waste in actual numbers.
It never skimps on security. Works with Claude Code and Codex. One command to install, one to remove.
Free, on GitHub. Link below. Token Engineering Harness.
